description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, light-colored material, likely faux leather or vinyl. The sofa features three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are attached and have a clean, rectangular profile. Four square throw pillows, matching the upholstery, are arranged symmetrically at the corners for added comfort and style. The armrests are straight, padded, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The legs are short, minimally visible, and likely made of dark plastic or wood, providing subtle elevation. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A sleek, light-colored three-seater sofa with straight armrests, attached cushions, and four matching throw pillows. The design is minimalist and modern, with a smooth, uniform upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, four matching throw pillows, and straight, padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, straight armrest, and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, emphasizing the sofa's uniform depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached seat cushions and three matching attached backrest cushions, with four loose square throw pillows placed at the corners.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at full seat height, rectangular profile, matching upholstery, no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, minimally visible legs, likely block style, placed at the corners, dark color, possibly plastic or wood, recessed for a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with three attached rectangular cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery with no visible pattern or decorative stitching; uniform color and texture throughout.
